fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(142, 142, 142)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(142, 142, 142));

stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(130, 130, 130));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 91px; margin-left: 1511px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Analysis Plan:
Utilize "Olist" customer and order records to detect traits of customers, orders, sellers, or products that show signs of a higher quantity of items purchased per order, eventually proposing a solution to increase said metric so that revenues will increase by at least 10% from a baseline

text.tspan: Utilize "Olist" customer and order records to detect traits of customers, orders,
sellers, or products that show signs of a higher quantity of items purchased
per order, eventually proposing a solution to increase said metric so that
revenues will increase by at least 10% from a baseline
